mapper.select: SELECT ACCOUNT_NO FROM ACCOUNTS WHERE USER_NO = #{_parameter} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT NVL(AVAILABLE_CASH, 0) FROM ACCOUNT_BALANCE WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS ( ORDER_ID, ORDER_KIND, ORDER_TYPE, PRICE, QUANTITY, STATUS, CREATED_AT, USER_NO, STOCK_CODE ) VALUES ( SEQ_ORDERS.NEXTVAL, #{orderKind}, #{orderType}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{status}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{userNo}, #{stockCode} )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO STOCKS_HELD sh USING ( SELECT #{accountNo} AS ACCOUNT_NO, #{stockCode} AS STOCK_CODE, #{quantity} AS QUANTITY, #{price} AS PRICE FROM DUAL ) src ON ( sh.ACCOUNT_NO = src.ACCOUNT_NO AND sh.STOCK_CODE = src.STOCK_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET sh.AVG_PRICE = ( (NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) * NVL(sh.AVG_PRICE, 0)) + (src.QUANTITY * src.PRICE) ) / (NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) + src.QUANTITY), sh.STOCK_RESERVES = NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) + src.QUANTITY WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( STOCKS_HELD_NO, ACCOUNT_NO, STOCK_CODE, STOCK_RESERVES, AVG_PRICE ) VALUES ( SEQ_STOCKS_HELD.NEXTVAL, src.ACCOUNT_NO, src.STOCK_CODE, src.QUANTITY, src.PRICE )
